data.content: Planned fix for stale grooming dispatch empty state. Scope is UI-only unless tests reveal API coupling: add Dispatch-tab deep-open support, pass an open-settings callback to the stale-beats modal, and replace the destructive raw `defaultError` with neutral helper copy plus an Open Dispatch Settings action. Preserve explicit model review behavior. Validation should include lint, typecheck, unit tests, build, and preferably a local browser smoke check.
